comment: DC2 donor-distribution registry (docs/dc2/ENEMY-DISTRIBUTION-PLAN.md D2/D4/D5). One row per weighable donor species (= Dc2SpeciesTable Known+LAND, locked by Dc2EnemyDistributionTests). default_weight 0-15 biases the per-room weighted donor pick (equal weights over a room's valid donors reproduce the legacy uniform pick exactly); room_cap bounds how many rooms a species may win per seed in weighted mode (null = unlimited). Tuning rarity is an edit HERE, not a code change. Pool MEMBERSHIP still comes from the boss/setpiece toggles; weights only bias among members.
